_comment: n6 segment tuning SSOT — Phase 1 introduces file + loader; consumer migrations follow later.

_rationale.block_size: atlas.n6 segment block in lines: 4096 chosen to balance mmap page alignment (~4KB) and ~9600 entry total (≈2-3 blocks).
_rationale.stride: Prefix bucket scan stride across blocks: 512 keeps O(k) lookup overhead small while avoiding pathological linear walks.
_rationale.bucket_prefix_depth: atlas scan bucket index prefix chars: 3 matches Y-commit (19cd7076) default for O(1+k) lookup on 9.6k entries.
_rationale.zstd_level: Compress level for cold-segment sidecar: 9 gives ~2x ratio vs. 3 on label-heavy atlas text without blowing budget on init.
_rationale.delta_log_compact_interval: Delta append log rows before compaction into base segment: 2048 cap bounds replay cost while rare enough not to stall hot writes.
_rationale.bloom_bits_per_entry: Bloom filter bits per key: 10 yields ~1% false-positive rate (optimal k=7 at this m/n).
_rationale.bloom_hash_count: Hash function count (k) for bloom: 7 derived from (m/n)*ln(2) ≈ 10*0.693 ≈ 7.
_rationale.hot_shard_promote_threshold: Access count before cold entry promotes to hot_shard: 8 balances promotion churn vs. latency recovery for repeated lookups.
